name: reviewcartdeals
description: A blank template to get started with Payload 3.0

scripts.prebuild: bun run migrate:production && NODE_ENV=production NEXT_PHASE=phase-production-build NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation bunx tsx src/scripts/write-build-slugs.ts
scripts.analyze: NODE_ENV=production NEXT_PHASE=phase-production-build NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation bunx tsx src/scripts/write-build-slugs.ts && cross-env ANALYZE=true NODE_ENV=production NEXT_PHASE=phase-production-build NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation next build --webpack && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation bunx tsx src/scripts/strip-vercel-og-trace.ts
scripts.build: NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=8000" next build --webpack && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation bunx tsx src/scripts/strip-vercel-og-trace.ts
scripts.cf:build: bun run prebuild && bunx opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.cf:deploy: bun run deploy:database && bunx opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.deploy: bun run deploy:database && bun run deploy:app
scripts.deploy:app: bun run prebuild && bunx opennextjs-cloudflare build && bunx opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.devsafe: rm -rf .next && rm -rf .open-next && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation next dev --no-server-fast-refresh
scripts.generate:types: bun run generate:types:cloudflare && bun run generate:types:payload
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit
scripts.preview: bun run prebuild && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare preview --env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e

PAYLOAD_SECRET.description: Generate a random string using `openssl rand -hex 32`
